name: @libertai/web-shared
description: Shared frontend code for LibertAI web apps (auth store, LoginPanel, inference SDK). Consumed as source via a git submodule + Vite alias — not built or published.
//: Runtime deps are PEER deps (provided by the consuming app). devDependencies are codegen-only: install here (`pnpm install`) solely to regenerate the inference SDK via `pnpm gen:sdk`.
